nonStorageClass: "{0}" cannot be used for classification because it is not a storage class.

onSaveErrorMsg: Please provide values for required properties.

invalidValueError: The given input is invalid. Make sure correct value is entered for "{0}".
outOfRangeError: The given value for "{0}" was not saved because it lies outside of the value range.
navigationToICOView: You will be navigated to classification object view mode. Are you sure you want to navigate?
NoPropertiesMessage: There are no filters for this class. Please select another class to filter.
Awp0ClassificationSearchFilterDesc: Show or hide the Navigate panel where you search for classified objects. You can search by class or narrow the search using filters.
classifySortAscCmdDesc: Sort the class hierarchy alphabetically from A to Z.
classifySortDescCmdDesc: Sort the class hierarchy in reverse alphabetical order, from Z to A.
classifySortDefaultCmdDesc: Sort the class hierarchy using the default setting.
Awp0ClassificationDesc: Classify the selection with searchable properties. You can choose a class containing predefined properties using the class hierarchy. The classified properties can be viewed in the Overview or Classification tab.
Awp0SearchSimilarDesc: Search for objects based on the properties of the selection.
classifyCopyCmdDesc: Copy the classification to the clipboard.
classifyPasteCmdDesc: Apply the classification copied from the clipboard to the selection.
classifyCancelCmdDesc: Cancel the changes and exit the edit mode.
classifySaveExitCmdDesc: Save the changes and exit the edit mode.
classifyShowCmdDesc: Hide the properties that do not contain a value.
classifyTableViewCmdDesc: View the properties in a table.
clsPropGroupsDesc: View properties organized in groups. Provides a high level overview of properties in the class, and helps quickly navigate to a specific property.
clsImagesDesc: View images attached to the class.
classifyMandatoryCmdDesc: View only the properties required to classify this item.
classifyImageMaximizeCmdDesc: View wider version of the images.
cmdExitFullSizeHorizontalDesc: View narrower version of the images.
classifyShowClearCmdDesc: Removes all text from all classification properties
classifyShowAnnoCmdDesc: Show or hide an abbreviation that links the classification property with a drawing or specification sheet.
clsMetricGrpDesc: View the property values in either metric or non-metric units.
classifyFullScreenCmdDesc: View this section in full screen
cmdShowRequiredPropertiesDesc: View only the properties required to classify this item
clsMetricDesc: View the property values in metric units.
clsNonMetricDesc: View the property values in non-metric units.
classifyImageExitFullScreenCmdDesc: Exit full screen and return to standard view
AIReviewMsg: This object has been auto-classified using AI. The classification is under review.
